title: Keto American Frittata
description: A dense and flavorful frittata, packed with eggs and perfect for a keto diet. Serve for breakfast, lunch, or dinner.

ingredients.name: diced roasted vegetables (bell peppers, onions, mushrooms)
ingredients.notes: such as zucchini and cherry tomatoes

instructions: In a large skillet, cook diced roasted vegetables until tender.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, salt, and pepper.
Add grated cheddar cheese to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour egg mixture over cooked vegetables in skillet.
Transfer skillet to oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until eggs are set.
Remove from oven and garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
Let cool before slicing and serving.
